title: Carpe Diem , -> Gather ye rosebuds while ye may
quote: Old Time is still a-flying;And this same flower that smiles to-day,To-morrow will be dying. ( Robert Herrick 1648)
question:
A student believes every day is a new chance to succeed.
 Write a Java program named CarpeDiem that prints a motivational message about seizing the day.

title: O Captain! My Captain  (Walt Whitman 1865 )
quote: O Captain! My Captain! our fearful voyage is done.
question:
A ship is lost at sea with two possible directions. 
 If the captain chooses the safe course (true), print a message of survival and hope. Otherwise, print a message of loss in the storm.
